blocks.title: Partners Pathways
blocks.description: Funding partner, DAC agent, broker, affiliate, sub-affiliate, and partner training pathways.

items.title: Become a Funding Partner
items.description: Apply to sell and refer capital, credit, fintech, AI, and tool pathways through the partner network.

items.title: Join DAC
items.description: Register as a David Allen Capital agent and learn the funding-agency model.

items.title: Broker Opportunities
items.description: Explore broker and referral programs for business finance, credit, banking, and fintech products.

items.title: Affiliate Directory
items.description: Directory of affiliate and referral programs that can fit the operator stack.

items.title: Sub-Affiliate Recruiting
items.description: Team-building and downline-oriented partner systems where allowed by partner programs.

items.title: Partner Training
items.description: Scripts, funnels, onboarding, lead routing, and partner enablement assets.

blocks.title: Operator Brief
blocks.description: This section should educate, route, and qualify visitors before pushing them into the right partners pathway.
bullets: Use localStorage during beta to remember quiz/pathway choices.
Add /api/lead submission when the data layer goes live.

blocks.title: Request Partners Access
blocks.description: Tell us what you need from the Partners stack and we will route you accordingly.
